titleStmt.title: SII 15.233: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 233. (A.R. No. 437 of 1926.) MANGUṆḌI, DHARWAR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab lying near the ruined temple of Siddhaliṅgēśvara.

The record contains six dates. The first is the 16th year of the reign of Vīra-Jayakēśidēva, commencing from the Kaliyuga year 4289, Dundubhi, Pushya ba. 8, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa. The Kaliyuga year cited is the year from which the regnal year was reckoned. For the cyclic year Dundubhi falling within the reign of the Kadamba king, the details correspond to 1203 A.D., January 7. The weekday, however, was Tuesday.

The second date which is the cyclic year Rudhirōdgāri, Śrāvaṇa-pūrṇami, Friday, corresponds to 1203 A.D., July 25. The third date is the 25th year of the reign of Vīra-Jayakēśidēva, commencing from Kaliyuga year 4288, Prajāpati, Śrāvaṇa ba. 13, Monday. This corresponds to 1211 A.D., August 8, the year being current. The fourth date is the 28th year of the reign of Vīra-Jayakēśidēva, coMmencing from the Kaliyuga year 4289, Bhāva, Māgha ba. 1, Saturday, which corresponds to 1215 A.D., January 17, Saturday, f.d.t. °21. The fifth date is the 2nd regnal year of Vīra-Vajradēva, Dhātu, Śrāvaṇa śu. 5, Thursday, corresponding to 1216 A.D., July 2. The last date is the 2nd regnal year of Vīra-Vajradēva. Dhātu, Mārgasīrsha śu [1] the weekday being lost. The details cannot be verified but it falls in the month of November in 1216 A.D.

The inscription commences with the formal Chālukya praśasti and refers to the reign of Tribhuvanamalla or Sōmēśvara IV who was actually no more. After giving a brief account of the Kadamba rulers of Goa, it introduces Jayakēśin III and his son Vajradēva who were ruling over Palasige Nāḍu. Next is described a line of ascetics who flourished at Maṇigundage in Hulambi Seventy. The last of them was Chandrabhūshaṇa. At the instance of this teacher a temple of Śiva was constructed with the co-operation of the residents of the place and named Tribuvanavīra-Jayakēśi, also called Siddhēśvara. Various gifts consisting of land, fixed shares of income, oil, etc., were made to this deity by Chauḍa-gāvuṇḍa, the Five-Hundred-and-four representatives of the place and others and these were entrusted into the hands of the above named teacher who was the trustee of the temple. Among such donors are mentioned the Three Hundred of Muguda, Ugura Three Hundred of Huppavaḷḷi, Nuggiyahaḷḷi, Sattivūr and the others of Kandagallu. Nandigāve, Sonnaligeyapura, Vijayāpura, Ayyāvaḷe and Khēḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ nama śivāya . namastuṁgaśirastuṁgacaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya saṁ
bhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi vriddhipravarddhamāna mā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ(baraṁ) saluttamire . vri . palateṟadiṁ palarppogaḷe raṁjisutirppa sudā naśūradiṁ sulali
ta kīrttiyaṁ taḷeda dibya tapōdhanadiṁnivaṁ karaṁ malevaribhūparaṁ darppamiradirppuva vīrabhaṭāḷiyiṁ karaṁ pala
sugenāḍadēṁ sogayisirddudō kaḷpamahījadaṁdadiṁ . ka . Ā viṣayamanāḷdarppalarī vasudheya duṣṭaripugaḷaṁ geldudidu kēvame bhūḷa
mipāḷakāvarttamageṟagi niṁda bhūmīsvararaṁ . Antānvayadoḷu . vṟi . dēvaṁkāva ḍevanyabhūparariyaṁ koṁdikkuvaṁ bhītaraṁ
kāvaṁ taṁnna padadvayakkeṟagalā śatrukṣitīśarkkaḷiṁnēnaṁ pēḷimenuttiralke śivacittaṁ vīra permmāḍi tāṁ bhūvaṁdyaṁ negaḷdaṁ parārtthacaritaṁ dōrggarvvadoṁ
du . ka . Ātana sahōdaraṁ tāṁ bhūtaḷadoḷu kīrttivetta(ṁ)namaḷacaritraṁ mātēnū vijayadēvaṁgātaṁgārssariya bhū
mipāḷarddhareyoḷu . Ātaṁgādaṁ tanūjaṁ bhūnuta jayakēśidēvamahipaṁ taḷedaṁ mānanidi sakaḷadhātriyanēnuṁ todaḷilla taṁna dakṣiṇabhujadoḷ .
va . Antā nṛpaṁ taṁna dakṣiṇabhujādaṁḍadiṁ bhūmaṁḍaḷamanottiyāḷdaṁ tanageṟa gadaribhūpara kādu vikrāṁtadurbbiniṁderagida virōdhibhūparaṁ nelake sōvara
māḍisi saptakōṭīśvaradēvalabdavaraprasādanuṁ koṁkaṇacakravarttiyuṁ haracaraṇa prasūtanuṁ tyāgasiṁhāsanacakravarttiyumeṁbivu modalāda
nēka peserggaḷesadu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyageyutta(tti)rddu . mattaṁ . puru hūtaṁgeṁdu vajrāyudhavatuḷabaḷaṁ rāmaṁgeṁtu bāṇaṁ girijādhī
śaṁge tējaṁ piridenisida pāṁḍurājaṁge pārtthaṁ kiraṇaṁ sūryyaṁge puṭṭirdda mavara teṟadi puṇyātmakaṁ puṭṭidaṁtā naranātha vajradēvaṁ jitaripu ja
yakēśi kṣitīśage vīraṁ . mattamātana kṣatriyapavitrana nāḍoḷu hulaṁbiyeppattaṟoḷage . gaṇanegaḷuṁbavappa banadiṁ harikā
ya nīrggaḷiṁde tiṁtiṇiyenisidda patraphaḷapu[®pa]cayaṁgaḷinoldu nōḍe kaṇtaṇi yuva nirjjarōdakadi pūgoḷadiṁdesadirppudeṁdu dhāriṇi mige baṁ
ṇisaluke maṇiguṁdage śōbhisutirppudāvagaṁ . va . Alli samastadhuraṁdhararappa tāpa sāṁnvayameṁteṁdaḍaṁ .
. manasija ninna darppamanaḍaṁgisu pōgiravēḍa ninna durvvinayadi ninna leye nutta rājavimukhyana kāhaḷōghavārddhinivise mecci micca
ṁdhare baṁṇisa peṁpiniṁdirppanī śivasakti kaṇgesadanāśritakaḷpamahījaneṁbinaṁ . v® . dharegōrvvaṁ śivaśaktidēvamunipaṁ rāddhāṁ
paṁ smaradarppārisamastaśāstranipuṇaṁ cāritravārāsibandharavakkuṁ śivaśāsanāṁbaraśaśāṁkaṁ kīrtthiyaṁ tāḷdidaṁ paramānaṁdade dāra
prāsāda vistārakaṁ . v® . Antā munīśvaratanūbhava . dorevettaṁ sūktivettaṁ sakaḷamahimevettaṁ diṭaṁ peṁpuvettaṁ sthiracittaṁ śudhav®ttaṁ
paramapadavivettaṁ guṇaṁbetta(ṁ)neṁdīdhare niccaṁ nicca baṁṇnippudu sakaḷaguṇaśrīgaḍarppāda yōgīśvaranīśānākhyanenatuḷaguṇōddhāmanaṁ prēmadiṁ
daṁ . Avara mahimōṁnatikkege bhuvanadoḷārssariyenal tapaduṁnatiyiṁ dhavaḷisida kīrttiyoḷījavaya munīśvaranaśēṣa dhā
trītaḷamaṁ . Antā munīṁdrapādōpāṁtadoḷatiśayade tāḷdi tapaduṁnatiyaṁ kaṁtuge bhayamaṁ māḍi samaṁteseda māhā munīṁdra
nēṁ pesarggoḷuvaṁ . śrī girijāvaraṁ sakaḷadēvajanastutanakṣayaṁ manōrāgi(ga)dinīge maṁgaḷamanutsavamuṁ caritārtthavṛttiyiṁ yōgijanastutaṁge sa
kaḷāśritakaḷpakujaṁge śaṁkara caṁdrabhūsanamunipravaraṁge dhariti nilvinaṁ . bhāvajavajanaṁda śōbhisi sāsvatamappa sukhasvarūpadiṁdā
va tapasvi pēḷ dharege raṁjipanī munimukhyanandadiṁ kāvanaśēṣajīvanicayaṁgaḷanuddhata mōharājanaṁ sōvanaśēṣadānanidhi mānapayōnidhi
caṁdrabhūṣaṇaṁ . Antā munīśvaraṁ sakaḷadharmmaprāsādamūlastaṁbhadante śivaśāsana manuddharisuva bageyiṁ samasta bhaktareṁba sarvva samōḷi karedu .
māḍideṁ sivagrihamaṁ nāḍoḷanūnaprasiddhiyaṁ paḍedudanuṁ kēḍillada sukhanidhiyaṁ bēḍuvenīśvaranoḷeṁdu mana nuḍiyaloḍaṁ .
neradu baṇaṁjigarmmudade kaṭṭidoḍaṁtara paṭṭavartthiyiṁdavara babāppuveṁdate karedittude cāgavārggevendiradatikōpadiṁ muḷiyalā jīvanannaraśēṣadharmma
bharadoḷ rakṣiparnnegaḷda paṭṭaṇanālka�ḷippa seṭṭiyaruvirasagoṁḍa bhakta janāvaḷiyoḷu dēvadāsiseṭṭiya sutanaṁ kāva
dharmmamanivaṁ budhatatige vastuvaṁ gaṁgaṁṇaṁ . [Ēmemma] śaktiyiṁdaṁ nimmaḍigaḷu besasi daṁdadiṁ śivagrahamaṁ nūrmmaḍi māḍuva
vaṁdaṁpermmege kāḷidāsanatimudadiṁdaṁ . smararipupadābjabhṛṁgaṁ sthirataratēja guṇā� dāna vidhānaṁ varapuṇyamūrttiyenipaṁ karame
savaṁka va nāganamaḷacaritraṁ . Aṁntavaru mukhyavāgi yanaṁntippa dartti yiṁde tōṁṭiganikaraṁ kaṁtuge sariyādavarggaḷumaṁ tāṇamaṁ mā
ḍidarmmahōtsavadiṁdaṁ . v® . nuḍidaṁtūrjjita kāryyamaṁ paḍedu māḷparmmānya vaṁ maṁnipaggaḍaṇaṁ taṁmoḷanūnamāgi varadharṁmmādhārarādarmmanaṁ bē
ḍe vaṁdibrātamaṁ samuddharisuvaduvaṁ koṭṭavarppaḍe mātēṁ sthiracittarī yugura mūnūrvvarmmahāmahimarō . Ugurēśvaradēvakramayugamaṁ pūjisuva
rarttiyiṁdanavarataṁ sogayisuvareṁdu baṁṇnipenagaṇitaguṇayutaranuguramūnūrvaru maṁ . vri . Eleya bhūjaṁgaraṁgajanarūpina peṁpi
noḷaṁ samānadiṁdale sogayirpparī dharege satuḷaṁ sucaritravṛttiyaṁdalasada māḷpa dāna guṇadiṁ mahimōṁnnatiyaṁ jagajjanaṁ palataṟadiṁde
baṇnisaludāttaguṇāṁnvitarī dharitriyoḷ . sthiradiṁde mūlavaḷiya paramana pādāṁ buja yugmamaṁ pūjisuvartthadiṁdavalliya bojaṁgarbhbharadiṁ
naṁ manōjāṁtakanaṁ . padapiṁ māḍuva dānaśakti śivadharmmādhārakatvaṁ jagakkoda virddārppu puṇyaduṁnavatikeyiṁdoppirppa gāṁbhīryyasaṁpadava
tyūrjjitamappa tējavinituṁ taṁmiṁdavādappuveṁbudu lōka puṁṇyamūrtti gaḷivarssāsirvvarēṁ dhanyarō . matimaṁtarmahimāsamarttharatiśuddhā
cāraratyaṁtasaṁstutasucittarudāttarapratimariṁtī dhātriyoḷu saṁpadaruṁnnatiyoḷukēva ḷame mahāmahimareṁbī permmeyaṁ pettareṁba śuddhasucari
tra rivarssāsirvvarēṁ dhanyarō . dhare baṁṇnippudu tējaduṁnatikeyiṁ gāṁ bhīryyadoṁdōjeyiṁ piriduṁ śōbhisutirppanaṁ sucaritaprakhyātanaṁti
rppaneṁburutējōdhikasūnuvaṁ parahitabyāpāranaṁ puṇyadiṁ dorevettirddanatyudāra ṇaṁ cāvuṁḍa gāvuṁḍanaṁ . Aṁtā samastabhaktaruṁ caṁdrabhū
ṣaṇadēvara niyamadiṁ śrī tṛtribhuvanavīrajayakēśidēvara dēvālayamaṁ savistaraṁ māḍidaradeṁtane . svasti kaliyuga saṁvatsaraṁ 4289 saṁ
daṁdādiyāgi śrīvīrajayakēśidēvavarṣada 16 neya duṁdubhi saṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa Aṣtami budhavāradaṁdu vuttarāyaṇa saṁkramaṇa nimittaṁ cau
ḍa gāvuṁḍaṁ holibana huṇisayiṁ paḍuvalu voṁdu mattaru keyyiṁ A maṇiguṁdageya tribhuvanavīrajayakēśidēvara Acāryyaru caṁdrabhū
ṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁkarcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭanu . mattaṁ rudhirōdgāri saṁvatsa rada śrānaṇa śuddha puṇṇami śukravāradaṁdā maṇikuṁdageya sthaḷadā mū
nūrvvaru caitrada parvvakke pavitrada parvvakke Āḷalli hāga hasaya ha� vaṁntanitumaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhā
rāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattamā maṇiguṁdageyaydunūṟanālvaruṁ caitraḍa parvvakke Āḷalli hāga pavitrada parvvakke Āḷalli hāgavananitumaṁ caṁdra
bhūṣaṇadēvara kālaṁkarcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattaṁ kāvaṇada vināyakaṁge hasaya haṇaṁ modalāgi yā vināyakaṁge Ēnuhuṭṭidaḍaṁ
koṭṭeveṁdu Ā caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁkarcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru mattaṁ mugudada mūnūrvvaruṁ pavitrada parvvakke Aḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁ
drabhūṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattaṁ huppavaḷḷiya vuguramūnūrvvaru pavitrada parvvakke Āḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁdra
bhūṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattaṁ nuggiyahaḷḷi ya vuguramūnūrvvaruṁ pavitrada parvvakke Āḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadē
varige kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattaṁ sattivūra vuguramūnūrvvaruṁ pavitrada parvvakke Āḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁ karcchi dhārāpū
rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattanituṁ sāgaraduguramūnūrvvaruṁ pavitrada parvva kke Āḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇa dēvarige kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi ko
ṭṭaru . yiṁtī Aidu sthaḷadavaru pavitrada para(rvva) nōḍalu baṁndu dēvakāryamaṁ kaṁḍu dēvara prasādamanuṁḍu sthaḷamukhyavāgi bāḷabaḷi harvvadali pavitra
da parvvakke Āḷalli hāgamaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvarige kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattaṁ kōlikō kaṁdaṁgallu naṁndigāve sūnnaligeyapura
vijayapuradayyāvaḷa khēḍavintī sthaḷadavaru mukhyavāgi sāsirvvaruṁ pavitrada parvvakke nōḍaluṁ baṁdu dēvara kāryyamaṁ kaṁḍu saṁtōsaṁ baṭṭu dēvarige hēṟiṁ
ga vīsa kāvaṇakka hēṟiṁge vīsama vokkaliṁge varṣaṁprati hāgavaṁ sāsirvvaruṁ nālku paṭṭaṇa mukhyavāgi caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru [.]
mattavā maṇiguṁdageya sthaḷadalu Aivattokkalu gāṇake soṭige yaṁṇeyaṁ horagaṇiṁ baṁdu māṟuva hāgake soṭige yeṁṇeyaṁ dhārāpūrvvakamāgi caṁdra
bhūṣaṇadēvarige koṭṭaru . śaraṇāgatarakṣakaraṁ hariharapādābjabhriṁgaraṁ dhāraṇiyoḷu sarigillade ballāḷgaḷanatimudadiṁ poḷacilli mūnūrvvaru . caitrada parvva
ke hāga pavitrada parvvake hāgaviṁtinitumaṁ vokaliṁge hāgamaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . mattavā maṇiguṁdageya hi
ṭṭina taḷāṟaṁ ciṇnaya nāyakaṁ taṁnna taḷāṟageyoḷage biḷiya koḷana muṁdottina huṇaseya marana hora kaṁba keyyaṁ caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvara
kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . svasti kaliyuga saṁvatsaraṁ 4288 saṁdaṁdādiyāgi śrī kādaṁba śrī vīra jayakēśi dēvavarṣada 25 neya prajāpati saṁvatsa
raṁ śrāvaṇa bahuḷa 13 sōmavāradaṁdu narasiṁha paṭṭavarddhanaru kīḷvāgu nōṁpiya dakṣiṇeya dānadiṁ maiḷalamahādēviyavara keyyaṁ haḍada maṇiguṁdageya kuruḍa
na koḷana kaḷagaṇa modalēriya nālku bhaṁḍi bhattada gaddeyanu Avara makkaḷu mādhava ghaissaru Avara taṁmmaṁdiru va paddayyaṁgaḷu Avara taṁmmaṁdiru tikayyaṁgaḷu Avara taṁmmaṁ
diru viṣṇudēvanaṁtā nālvara kaiyyalu Ā gaddeyanu maṇiguṁdageya jōIsa bommayyaṁgaḷa makkaḷu Acayya tippayyaṁgaḷu krayavāgi koṁḍiralu Ā tippayya māḍida riṇakke [Ā]
tanataṁmaṁ Ātana heṁḍati tippavve tamma bhāva Acayyaṁge kuḍalu Ā Acayyanu tanna gaddeya nālku bhaṁḍi bhattada sthaḷada nālku sīmeyeṁteṁdaḍe . mūḍaṇasīme hu
ppavaḷḷiya sīme baḍagaṇa sīme huppavaḷḷiya dāri teṁkaṇasīme Araḷiya gaddeya baḍagaṇa baruhu mēre paḍuvaṇa sīmege kurucana koḷana Ēri Aṁtā nālkuṁ sīmeya stha
ḷa hacugiloḷage Aḻugeyavara mane magila hoṟage Ikkeya mana Akṣiṇi Āgāmi sahita samasta badi sahita maṇiguṁdageya śrī grāmēśvaradēvarācāryya caṁdrabhūṣa
ṇadēvara keyyalu lokkiya priyaśrāheya gadyāṇa 52 maṁ koṁḍu Ā grāmēśvaradēvarige krayadānavāgi koṭṭaru . svasti kaliyuga saṁvatsaraṁ 4289 saṁdaṁdādiyā
gi śrī kādaṁba śrī vīrajayakēśidēvavarṣada 28 neya bhāva saṁvatsarada māgha ba 1 vaḍḍa vāradaṁdu hūliya Iśvarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyaruṁ Avara makkaḷu nārasiṁhabhaṭṭaru Aṁtivara kaiyyaluṁ
maṇiguṁdageyalu siddēśvaradēvara vupahāra dēvakāryyanimittaṁ Ā sthānācāryya caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvaru Ā maṇiguṁdageya praviṣṭada bommanahaḷḷiyalli śrīmadarasaralli Ā yīśvarabhaṭṭaru ha
ḍada bhūmiyoḷage mareya bōra māḍuva gaddeya Eraḍu hasugeya voṁbhattu bhaṁḍi bhattada sthaḷa Ā baḷiya hakkalu Adara nālku sīme Eṁtaṁdaḍe mūḍaṇa sīme bommana haḷḷiya keṟeya muṁ
dottina Ēri teṁkaṇasīme bommanahaḷḷiya baḍagada sīme haḷḷaṁga� yiṁ baṁda bhaṁḍidāri paḍuvaṇasīme kariyarāyaṇana hakkala baruhu . baḍagalu malla� haḷḷiya holana sīme mēre Aṁtā nālku
sīmevoḷage jala vrikṣa pāṣāṇa triṇa kadaṁba caturāghāṭa sahita Ā keyya baḷiya maneya nivēṣanadoḷage hitilalu mūḍaluṁ paḍuvaluṁ Ayigayiyagala . teṁkaluṁ baḍagaluṁ Ā maneya
nīḷa hoṟagāgi Ā voṁdu sthaḷada maneya nivēśana mattadaṟiṁ maṇeya kāvaṇa villa Akṣiṇi Āgāmi sahita samasta baḷi sahita yiṁtidakke Ā Iśvarabhaṭṭōpādhyāyarige Ā caṁdrabhūṣaṇa
ya gadyāṇa Aṟuvattu honnakoṭṭukrayadānavāgi koṁḍaru Ā bhūmiyanu māṟakoṁballi hattida honnu kuṟiya gētaṇanuṁ hulugula kallaṇanuṁ koṭṭu dharmmavaṁ māḍidaru svasti
vīrabhujabaḷa vajradēvavarṣada 2 neya dhātu saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa suddha 5 guruvāradaṁdu maṇiguṁdegeya vrittimaṁta brāhmaṇaru Ā sthaḷada siddhēśvaradācāryya caṁdrabhūṣaṇa
dēvara Ā siddēśvara grāmēśvaradēvara sthaḷada keyimanegaḷu brāhmaṇa vrittivōpādiya dēhāraṇeyanāvuduvaṁ koḷḷeveṁdu koṭṭa Ā brāhmaṇavritti yō
pādiya hasugeyanāvuduvaṁ Ā caṁdrabhūṣaṇadēvaraṟasaveṁdu Ā brāhmaṇarige koṭṭa kūci . Ā maṇiguṁdageyuguramūnūrvvaru śrī siddhēśvara dēvara
caitrakke bēḷeya biṭṭaru . Ā maṇiguṁdageya Ayinūṟanālvaru Ā siddhēśvaradēvarige Āḷige caitrakke hāgavoṁdu pavitrakke hāgavoṁdu biṭṭaru Āḷāgi rāsigeṟuvalli kāvaṇada
hasige haṇavoṁda biṭṭaru . sāsirvvaru Ā siddhēśvaradēvarige Eleya hēṟiṁge vīsavoṁda biṭṭaru . suṁkadadhikāri dēvayya caṁdayyaṁgaḷu Ā grāmēśvara siddhēśvaradēvara sī
meya nivēśanagaḷoḷage Aṁgaḍi gāṇakke suṁka taḷasārige maṁnnaṇeyaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru . svasti śrī kādaṁba śrī vīrabhujabaḷa vajradēvavarṣada 2 neya dhātu saṁvatsarada mārggaśīrṣa śuddha
1 huliyamaseṭṭi taṁna maga bhairavana baṁḍiya hūḍidalli Ā bhairava mritanāgalu śrī siddhēśvaradēvara muṁde Ā bhairavana hesaralu bhairavadēvara pratiṣṭha
bhairavadēvara nityā na Upahārakke siddhēśvaradēvarācāryya caṁdrabhūśaṇadēvaru hūliya yīśvarabhaṭṭara kaiyiṁ
geyyavoḷage keḷagaṇa hasugeyoḷage modalēriya keḷage Ā caṁdra bhūṣaṇadēvara kaiyyalu
ya mattaṟoṁdu . sthaḷakke lokkiya gadyāṇa hattuma koṭṭa kraya vāgi koṁgu Olōgama dēva Āga koṭṭanu .
Digital edition of SII 15.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
